title: Prepared food public/private catalog with immutable nutrition versions
summary: 승인 artifact가 생기기 전 public row/result를 fail-closed 0건으로 유지하고, owner-only private manual 완제품을 검색하며 label 영양을 immutable version과 atomic current pointer로 생성·수정·soft-delete하는 backend-only catalog다.
goal: 현재 approved public promotion artifact 0건 경계를 지켜 importer/seed 없이 public rows/results를 0건으로 닫고, private manual catalog의 owner-only·결측 비제로 의미와 영양 변경 이력·과거 planner pin을 보존하는 backend 계약을 닫는다.

owners.claude: replaced only for the user-approved nutrition/products/planner program; the global stage-owner policy is unchanged
owners.codex: fresh role-separated Codex tasks own Stage 1 docs authoring, independent Stage 1.5 review and repair-final, Stage 2 backend TDD implementation, and independent exact-head Stage 3 review; no author or implementer self-approves

dependencies: ingredient-nutrition-conversion-model is merged and provides the shared approved nutrition source profile and value model
nutrition products planner contract is locked in official requirements v1.7.20 database v1.3.21 and API v1.2.25
independent fresh Codex Stage 1.5 approval is required before Stage 2 starts

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/prepared-food-catalog-api.test.ts tests/prepared-food-catalog-service.test.ts tests/prepared-food-catalog-rls.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/prepared-food-catalog-api.test.ts tests/prepared-food-catalog-service.test.ts tests/prepared-food-catalog-rls.test.ts

out_of_scope: Prepared food planner entry CRUD and product_entries planner projection
Meal day and week planned nutrition aggregation
Stage 4 UI frontend routes states Playwright screenshots and design authority artifacts
Shopping cooking leftover recipe count XP and activity product exclusion implementation
Barcode OCR dining out meal kit actual consumption and medical guidance
Client-supplied or inferred manual basis relations relation chaining generic density and arbitrary gram milliliter conversion
Public product creation mutation deletion promotion or name brand fuzzy merge by general users
Public importer operator CLI seed or row creation before a separately approved promotion artifact exists
Runtime provider calls raw provider payload storage synthetic fixture promotion and unreviewed public promotion
Any undocumented endpoint status error code request response field or database surface
notes: Stage 2 backend TDD implementation is in progress on feature/be-prepared-food-catalog after independent Stage 1.5 approval. Route/type/service and official two-table migration implement private manual atomic create, immutable nutrition replacement, metadata preservation, 409 compare-and-switch, idempotent soft delete, approved public stable-key read-only admission, safe attribution, owner/RLS and bounded set-based catalog projection. Targeted Vitest is green and an isolated PostgreSQL 17 cluster applied the relevant ingredient predecessor, recipe snapshot, and catalog migrations; actual two-connection conflict, create/update rollback, direct role denial, append-only, synthetic-public no-merge/stale-source exclusion, zero initial public rows, and cleanup passed. Approved public promotion artifacts and production/staging writes remain zero; no importer/operator CLI/public seed or UI/planner scope was added. Full repository migration stack and Supabase/PostgREST equivalence remain Manual Only. Independent Stage 3 exact-head review is still pending, so closeout is null and implementation is not self-approved.
